name: Account Number (NER)
description: Detects financial account numbers, credit cards, IBANs, and similar numeric identifiers via an active NER provider (OPF's ACCOUNT_NUMBER label). WARNING: OPF's ACCOUNT_NUMBER label is known to over-fire — on our benchmark it produced 614 predictions for 0 ground-truth bank-account spans. This rule is off-by-default-intent (enabled but recommended to disable via RuleOverride unless you have a fine-tuned OPF checkpoint). Precision rules in financial.* (credit_card_luhn, iban_mod97, routing_number) remain the primary detectors for formatted account numbers; this rule is here to expose the OPF capability for users who want it. Rule silently no-ops when no NER provider is active.

effect.message: Account number detected by NER redacted for de-identification
